title: Host Browser Runtime Toolchain Reopening Decision
objective: Decide whether to reopen a separate toolchain or materialization lane for host browser-runtime capability, or to keep host browser-runtime work closed and route any later browser compare to a different decision surface.
required_inputs: Current Olares host fact that `/home/olares/.cache/ms-playwright` is absent
Current Olares host fact that `@playwright/test` resolves as missing
The browser static-surface smoke target in `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.static-surfaces.smoke.spec.ts`
decision_scope: Decide whether to reopen a bounded separate toolchain or materialization lane for Playwright package resolution and browser-cache availability on Olares.
Alternatively decide to keep host browser-runtime work closed and route any later browser comparison to a separate workstation or optional-client decision surface.
Do not install packages, materialize browsers, or run browser-runtime smoke inside this packet.
decision_rationale: Packet 018 already established that the Olares host currently lacks both Playwright browser cache and `@playwright/test` package resolution.

Reopening a host browser-runtime toolchain or materialization lane would be a larger move than the validated Operations Visibility PM review tranche requires and would silently expand the no-install boundary.
The smallest truthful next step is to keep host browser-runtime work closed and decide separately whether any later browser comparison should occur from a non-host or optional-client surface instead.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 020 - Non-Host Browser Compare Decision Surface
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a decision-only packet. Host browser-runtime toolchain reopening remains closed because it would widen the current no-install Olares lane beyond the smallest truthful next move.
next_action: Use Packet 020 to decide whether any later browser comparison should run from a non-host or optional-client surface rather than from the Olares host.
